bias_notes: A flat, fair country track located on the Murray River. It features sweeping turns and a reliable 350m home straight that gives all runners a balanced opportunity.

handicapping_angles.track_bias: Generally plays highly fair. On dry days, horses with tactical early speed hold an edge, but the layout doesn't unfairly penalize backmarkers.
handicapping_angles.barrier_draw: Inside barriers are moderately helpful over the shorter sprint distances (1000m - 1200m) due to the run up to the first turn.

par_adjustment.algorithm_note: Baseline country form. Standard equalization applies.
